name: expert-skills
description: Agent skills that upskill AI agents with the specialized operational knowledge of credentialed practitioners. Not test-prep — see POLICY.md.

plugins.name: salesforce
plugins.description: 13 skills covering Salesforce certification domains — Administrator, Platform Developer, Technical Architect, the Consultants, and Agentforce — giving an agent credentialed-practitioner competence.

plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: AWS Professional-tier certification skills — Solutions Architect Professional (SAP-C02) and DevOps Engineer Professional (DOP-C02). Skeletons; operational content in progress.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub certification skills — starting with GitHub Actions (workflows, custom actions, runners, security). Skeleton.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Web/runtime competence skills — nodejs (OpenJS JSNAD/JSNSD), typescript, react, nextjs, react-native (the latter four are competence, no vendor cert). Skeletons.
